notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ezequiel Duran to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Cal Raleigh out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Cole Young steals (1) 2nd base. Cole Young to 3rd. Cole Young advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Kyle Higashioka.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Luke Raley reaches on a fielder's choice. Randy Arozarena to 3rd. Luke Raley to 2nd. Randy Arozarena advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Ezequiel Duran.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith walks. Corey Seager to 3rd. Jake Burger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Smith singles on a sharp ground ball to second baseman Cole Young. Wyatt Langford to 2nd.
